meaning: vt.打翻,颠覆,推翻,为...排版过密vi.打翻,排版过密
examples: There's a bus overset on the road.
The unstructured overset grid algorithm is explored in this paper.
Having neither sail oar or rudder and the least cap full of wind would have overset all my navigation.
Do not do anything that will cause you to be displaced or overset.
